ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" INTEGER /* Gender of the customer (1 for male, 0 for female) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "store_address" TEXT /* Address of the store */,
  "store_manager" TEXT /* Name of the store manager */,
  "store_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer who made the transaction */,
  "store_code" INTEGER /* Code of the store where the transaction took place */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was made */,
  "transaction_number" INTEGER /* Transaction number generated by the till */,
  "product_code" TEXT /* Code of the product purchased */,
  "total_spend" REAL /* Total spend amount for the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., cash, credit, debit) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_store_code FOREIGN KEY ("store_code") REFERENCES stores ("store_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_product_code FOREIGN KEY ("product_code") REFERENCES products ("product_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the product */,
  "product_price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "product_image" TEXT /* Image of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "gender" INTEGER /* Gender of the customer (1 for male, 0 for female) */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the customer */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_dates" (
  "transaction_date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction date */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was made */,
  "day_of_transaction" INTEGER /* Day of the transaction (1 for Monday, 2 for Tuesday, etc.) */,
  "week_number" INTEGER /* Week number of the year */,
  "quarter_number" INTEGER /* Quarter number of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, marketing team, store manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "action_performed" TEXT /* Action performed by the user */,
  "action_result" TEXT /* Result of the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "transaction_date_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction date */,
  "total_spend" REAL /* Total spend amount for the transaction */,
  "product_code" TEXT /* Code of the product purchased */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., sales, revenue) */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Value of the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_trends_transaction_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_date_id") REFERENCES transaction_dates ("transaction_date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segment */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the customer (e.g., 18-24, 25-34) */,
  "gender" INTEGER /* Gender of the customer (1 for male, 0 for female) */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the segment */,
  "segment_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_segments_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "segment_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer segment */,
  "transaction_date_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction date */,
  "total_spend" REAL /* Total spend amount for the transaction */,
  "segment_value" REAL /* Value of the segment */,
  "segment_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_segment_trends_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES customer_segments ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_segment_trends_transaction_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_date_id") REFERENCES transaction_dates ("transaction_date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the loyalty program */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of loyalty program */,
  "program_benefits" TEXT /* Benefits of the loyalty program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_loyalty" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loyalty program */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the customer enrolled in the program */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Enrollment status of the customer */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Points earned by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id", "program_id")
)
